title: Hard Gold tools
description: These tools allow you to break a 3x3 area directly in front of the player, targeting only specific blocks defined by the default tool type. :3
body:
These tools allow you to break a 3x3 area directly in front of the player, targeting only specific blocks defined by the default tool type.

![How works](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExc2kyYXkwamxhZXBmbWw5bm03cGcxcGhtcmxoeW1yM2J5eGx4ZHE0cSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/2wSL2pe44JwLX9YZwt/giphy.gif)
